features.name: class with same_type comparison method
features.description: Code should include a class with a method that takes the same class type as a parameter for comparison purposes

features.name: class with same_type copy method
features.description: Code should include a class with a method that takes the same class type as a parameter and modifies it

features.name: uvm_in_order_class_comparator instantiation
features.description: Code should include instantiation of UVM's in_order_class_comparator parameterized with a user-defined class
